summary: Completed frontend testing of trifold brochure design overhaul. Major features working but found 3 critical design issues: CTA text capitalization, image positioning not at bottom edges, and light gray text colors not darkened.

ui_bugs.issue: CTA text should be uppercase 'НЕ ОТКЛАДЫВАЙТЕ ЗДОРОВЬЕ НА ПОТОМ' but appears as 'Не откладывайте здоровье на потом'
Image not positioned at bottom despite margin-top: auto in CSS. Browser shows margin-top: 127.406px
Image not positioned at bottom despite margin-top: auto in CSS. Browser shows margin-top: 153.641px
Page labels still use light gray color #999 instead of darkened #555 as required

issues: Images not flush to bottom edges as specified
Light gray text colors (#999) not darkened to #555

passed_tests: CSS Grid uses repeat(3, 1fr) instead of fixed mm values
Panel 6 contains correct contact info (hospital1946.ru, info@hospital1946.ru, +86 198 7270 7491)
Page 2 all headings aligned at same vertical position (13mm padding-top)
All images load correctly (desk.jpg, qrcode-price.png, doctors.jpg, needles.jpg)
Landing page at / still works with preview iframes
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Panel 6 CTA text capitalization - should be uppercase 'НЕ ОТКЛАДЫВАЙТЕ ЗДОРОВЬЕ НА ПОТОМ'
Fix image positioning - doctors and needles images should be flush to bottom edges with margin-top: auto working correctly
Darken page label colors from #999 to #555 as specified in requirements
